name: The Whispers of Hazlewood
overview: The Whispers of Hazelwood is a suspenseful, mystery-driven show set in the small town of Hazelwood, where ancient secrets and long-buried truths linger in the shadows of the dense woods. The story follows 16-year-old Eve Carter, a curious and brave girl who begins uncovering strange occurrences around her home, leading her to a series of mysterious whispers from the forest. These whispers hold clues to her family’s past and the town’s hidden history, which, as Eve digs deeper, forces her to confront uncomfortable truths about her own identity and her family’s involvement in the town’s dark secrets.

trailers.title: The Whispers Of Hazelwood:- Echoes of the Past  // S1: Episode 1
